title: Reconcile Python simulator /messages resource with LCI /msg contract
description: Explorer found the Python simulator/resource layer exposes /messages with {from,to,text}, while the shared LCI client defaults to /msg and /msg/inbox with MessageDraft payload {to,body,ack}. Align the simulator/app resource contract or add compatibility mapping so TUI messaging tests and tools exercise the same LCI messaging semantics.
acceptance_criteria: Python simulator resources and LciClient messaging agree on paths and payload names, or explicit compatibility shims are documented and tested; send and inbox tests cover the chosen contract.
notes:
Completed no-hardware reconciliation by making the simulator/CoAP message contract explicit and guarded. Existing implementation already canonicalizes LCI messaging on /msg/inbox and /msg/sent via MessagesResource, with /messages as a legacy alias. Added MessagesResource.inbox() and changed LegacyMessagesAliasResource GET to return a copied legacy view that adds text=body for body-only LCI messages, preserving old simulator /messages readers while keeping /msg/inbox canonical. Added tests that LciClient defaults interoperate with a real in-memory MessagesResource over aiocoap and record exact default paths GET /msg/inbox and POST /msg/inbox. Added explicit /messages alias LciClient test and CoAP regression tests that legacy /messages returns text for body-only LCI messages and LCI POSTs.
Commands run: cd python && uv run pytest tests/client/test_lci.py tests/coap/test_messages_resource.py -q => 29 passed before compatibility shim expansion; cd python && uv run pytest tests/coap/test_messages_resource.py tests/client/test_lci.py tests/client/test_packet_coap.py tests/tui/test_native.py tests/test_lci_contract_docs.py -q => final 85 passed in 9.33s; cd python && uv run ruff check src/lichen/coap/resources.py tests/coap/test_messages_resource.py tests/client/test_lci.py => All checks passed; git diff --check => passed. No EC2 used; Python no-hardware only.
Review evidence: explorer confirmed canonical /msg/inbox and /msg/sent already exist, /messages is legacy alias, and recommended guarding compatibility risk where legacy /messages readers may expect text. Code review P2 fixed: injected aiocoap test contexts were not shut down by AiocoapResourceTransport when context was injected; fixed with explicit await context.shutdown() in finally blocks. Code review P2 fixed: first default-path test did not prove /msg/inbox because /messages shared storage; fixed with RecordingResourceTransport asserting exact GET /msg/inbox and POST /msg/inbox calls. Final reviewers Leibniz and Hooke reported no P0/P1/P2 findings. Unrelated untracked lichen/boards/renode/nucleo_wl55jc/_integration_test.resc remains outside this bead/commit.
close_reason: Completed no-hardware scope: canonical /msg/inbox LCI defaults are explicitly tested against simulator MessagesResource, /messages remains a documented compatibility alias with text compatibility for body-only LCI messages, and review/test evidence is recorded.
